dependencies: Third-party subcontractors perform significant work under contracts
Reliance on third-party equipment manufacturers and suppliers
Joint venture partners for project execution
risks: Subcontractor failure to provide services or meet quality standards
Third-party inability to obtain financing affecting material/equipment supply
Joint venture partner non-performance or default

regulatory_risks: U.S. federal government contract compliance and audits
Export control and anti-boycott laws compliance
GDPR and data privacy regulations (EU, UK, California)
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act violations
Security clearance requirements for government contracts
Professional licensing requirements in multiple jurisdictions
Tax law changes and audits in multiple jurisdictions
OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax rules
Nuclear liability regulations (Price-Anderson Act, international treaties)
Labor and employment regulations across jurisdictions

sanction_risks: Israel-Hamas conflict and Middle East tensions
